name: @clemmy/desktop
description: Clementine — native desktop shell. Supervises the daemon, opens the local dashboard, surfaces approvals and check-ins, manages credentials.

scripts.build: npm run build:notch-helper && tsc -p . && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && node scripts/rename-preload.mjs
scripts.package:dist: npm run build && npm run build:daemon && npm run build:mobile-web && npm run build:console-web && npm run vendor:recall-native && npm run vendor:whisper && npm run rebuild-daemon-natives && electron-builder && npm run restore-node-natives

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Clementine needs the microphone for live voice commands and optional meeting capture.
extendInfo.NSAudioCaptureUsageDescription: Clementine needs system audio access for optional meeting capture and transcription.
extendInfo.NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription: Clementine needs screen capture for optional meeting capture and screen-aware assistance.
extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: Clementine needs the camera only for optional video meeting capture.
extendInfo.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Clementine reads your calendar to surface upcoming meetings, attach context, and trigger meeting capture.
extendInfo.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Clementine reads and writes Reminders so it can sync tasks across your devices.
extendInfo.NSContactsUsageDescription: Clementine reads Contacts to identify meeting participants and draft messages to the right people.
extendInfo.NSAccessibilityUsageDescription: Clementine needs Accessibility access to observe active windows and route commands to the right app, like an assistant looking over your shoulder.
extendInfo.NSAppleEventsUsageDescription: Clementine sends commands to other apps (Mail, Calendar, Finder, etc.) so it can do work on your behalf without you switching windows.
extendInfo.NSSystemAdministrationUsageDescription: Clementine occasionally needs admin access for setup tasks like installing CLIs or configuring local services.
extendInfo.NSDownloadsFolderUsageDescription: Clementine reads and writes the Downloads folder when you ask it to grab files or save research artifacts.
extendInfo.NSDocumentsFolderUsageDescription: Clementine reads and writes the Documents folder when you ask it to work on local files.
extendInfo.NSDesktopFolderUsageDescription: Clementine reads and writes the Desktop when you ask it to work on files there.
extendInfo.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Clementine reads Photos when you reference images in a chat or workflow.
extendInfo.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Clementine uses location only when a workflow you start explicitly asks for it.
extendInfo.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Clementine uses Bluetooth only for accessory integrations you opt into.
extendInfo.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Clementine talks to local services (its own daemon, optional Pinecone/Supabase/etc. running locally) over your local network.
extendInfo.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Clementine sends notifications about completed work, pending approvals, and check-ins.
extendInfo.NSFocusStatusUsageDescription: Clementine reads Focus state so it knows when to stay quiet.
